description_long: This is a single, generously sized muffin with a domed, golden-brown top and a slightly irregular, rustic surface. The muffin is studded with visible chocolate chips, some of which are partially melted and embedded in the top and sides. The base is wrapped in a crinkled, plain white paper liner that extends up to about two-thirds of the muffin's height. The surface texture appears soft and slightly rough, with a matte finish and a few darker baked spots. There are no visible decorative elements or frosting, and the muffin is shown isolated against a white background with no visible support or setting.
description: A large, golden-brown muffin with chocolate chips and a plain white paper wrapper, featuring a soft, rustic surface and no frosting or decorations.
description_view_0: This view highlights the muffin's domed top with several prominent chocolate chips and a slightly uneven, golden-brown surface.
description_view_1: This angle shows more of the muffin's side, revealing the crinkled white paper wrapper and additional chocolate chips embedded in the surface.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the lighter, golden top and the distribution of chocolate chips, with the wrapper's texture clearly visible.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the muffin's top with fewer visible chocolate chips and a smoother, lighter baked surface.
